LightningMessageChannel.description: Lightning Message Service channel used by agentNudgeBubble to broadcast highlight requests to sibling wrapper LWCs (warrantyAdvisorPanel, productUpgradeStudio, connectedAssetDashboard).

lightningMessageFields.description: Identifier of the LWC to highlight, e.g. "coverageGapVisualizer", "reasoningExplainer", "predictiveMaintenanceCard".
Source context of the agent suggestion: warranty, upgrades, telemetry.
